raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a charge for {$130.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX appeared on my Citi credit card ending in XXXX. I paid the hotel in cash at check-in ( {$150.00} ), but I was also charged on my card without my authorization. 

I submitted a dispute to Citi with a completed dispute form that Citi provided me. I clearly explained that the hotel facilities were extremely poor, and I left early in the morning. I did not receive a receipt because I was in a stressful travel situation, coming from a war-affected region and arriving late at night. 

Citi denied my dispute, claiming that I did not respond, even though I did respond and submitted the required dispute form with all information. I have proof of the email I sent to Citi with the completed form attached. 

Citi closed the dispute without addressing the facts and without providing the information I requested about why my evidence was ignored. 

I am requesting that Citi reopen the dispute, review the documents I submitted, and remove the unauthorized or duplicate charge of {$130.00}.
